info.name: Help PR — Orders (core CRUD)
info.description:
Five core **order** endpoints for `help-pr-backend-staging`.

**Docs:** `docs/ORDER_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`, `docs/ORDER_GETALL_API_CHANGES.md`

**Nested payloads:** Create/update accept optional `additional_charges` and `order_payments` on the same body (see request descriptions).

**Legacy sub-routes:** `postman/Help-PR-Order-Charges-Payments.postman_collection.json` (standalone charge/payment CRUD if needed).

**Not in this collection (separate routes):** `GET /api/order/getCustomerOrder`, `PUT /api/order/serviceUpdate`, `PUT /api/order/cancle`, `PUT /api/order/cancleService`, `/api/order_service/*`, `/api/order/financial-payments/*`, `POST /api/getCount`, Razorpay webhook.

**Setup:** Set `baseUrl`, `accessToken` (Bearer JWT). After **Create**, copy `record.order_id` → `orderId` and `service_items[0]._id` → `orderServiceId`.

**Pricing:** Send `total_service_charge` + `service_id`; server calculates commission, tax (after offer), `total_price`, min deposit.

**Payment status:** Derived from customer `order_payment` rows — do **not** set `is_paid` on update.

variable.description: Mongo order _id — set after create or from list

query.description: in-progress | completed | cancelled | refunded. Invalid → 409. Disable param to omit.
unpaid | paid | partially_paid | refund | partially_refund. Disable to omit.
Free-text: unique_id, users, category, service, quote, city, franchise. Disable if empty.
ISO date. Alone = that UTC calendar day. With to_date = schedule overlap + order_date fallback. Disable to omit.
ISO date. Same single-day rule when used alone. Disable to omit.
Super/staff: optional filter. Franchise admin/employee: auto-scoped; must match own franchise or 403. Disable to omit.
Customer ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
Partner ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
Employee ObjectId filter. Disable to omit.
created_at | updated_at | order_date | order_status | total_price | sub_total | unique_id | is_paid | payment_status | tax | min_deposit | order_description
Legacy: 1 = asc, else desc if sort_order omitted

request.description:
**GET /api/order/getAll** — paginated order list (staff/backoffice).

**Access:** Super admin, staff, franchise admin, franchise employee. Partner / customer → **403** (customers: **GET /api/order/getCustomerOrder?user_id=**).

**Date filters:** Enable only `from_date` for single-day; only `to_date` for single-day; both for range.

**Response:** Hydrated rows with display names; `payment_status` on each record.

See `docs/ORDER_GETALL_API_CHANGES.md` for franchise scope and search behavior.

**GET /api/order/get/:id** — full order detail in one call.

**Includes:** populated customer/city/category/partner/employee/franchise/service/quote; **`service_items`** with line detail; **`additional_charges`**; **`order_payments`**; **`order_offer`** (if offer applied); **`payment_status`**; customer payment breakdown fields.

**Access:** Super admin / staff — any order. Franchise admin / employee — own franchise only. Partner / customer → **403**.

Use this instead of separate list-charges / list-payments calls for read-only UI.

**POST /api/order/create** — creates order + **exactly one** `order_service`.

**Nested (optional):**
- **`additional_charges`**: array or `{ create: [...] }` — each item: `amount` (required), `label`, `description`, `payment_method`, `charge_type`.
- **`order_payments`**: array or `{ create: [...] }` — each item: `payer_type` (`customer`|`partner`), `amount`, optional `status`, `payment_method`, `transaction_reference`, `paid_at`, `notes`.

Server recalculates **`total_price`** and **`payment_status`** after nested rows. Response may include **`record.nested`** with created ids.

Omit both arrays for order-only create. See `docs/ORDER_MODULE_FRONTEND.md` §7.

body.raw:
{
  "user_id": "REPLACE_CUSTOMER_OBJECT_ID",
  "partner_id": "REPLACE_PARTNER_OBJECT_ID",
  "employee_id": null,
  "franchise_id": null,
  "city_id": "REPLACE_CITY_OBJECT_ID",
  "category_id": "REPLACE_CATEGORY_OBJECT_ID",
  "service_id": "REPLACE_SERVICE_OBJECT_ID",
  "address": "456 Updated Street",
  "address_id": null,
  "order_date": "2026-06-15",
  "order_description": "Updated job notes",
  "customer_description": "Customer note",
  "from_date": "2026-06-15",
  "to_date": "2026-06-16",
  "work_start_time": "09:00",
  "work_end_time": "18:00",
  "payment_schedule_type": "single",
  "customer_payment_method": "upi",
  "order_status": "completed",
  "total_service_charge": 4000,
  "offer_id": null,
  "service_items": {
    "update": [
      {
        "_id": "{{orderServiceId}}",
        "partner_id": "REPLACE_PARTNER_OBJECT_ID",
        "service_date": "2026-06-15T00:00:00.000Z",
        "service_from_time": "2026-06-15T09:00:00.000Z",
        "service_to_time": "2026-06-15T18:00:00.000Z",
        "total_service_charge": 4000,
        "service_status": "completed"
      }
    ]
  },
  "additional_charges": {
    "create": [{ "amount": 100, "label": "Materials", "charge_type": "misc" }],
    "update": [{ "_id": "REPLACE_CHARGE_OBJECT_ID", "amount": 200 }],
    "delete": []
  },
  "order_payments": {
    "create": [
      {
        "payer_type": "customer",
        "amount": 1000,
        "status": "completed",
        "payment_method": "upi"
      }
    ],
    "update": [],
    "delete": []
  }
}

request.description:
**PUT /api/order/update/:id** — single payload for header, line, pricing, charges, and payments. **Remove keys you are not changing.**

**Header:** `user_id`, `partner_id`, `employee_id`, `franchise_id`, `city_id`, `category_id`, `service_id`, `address`, `address_id`, `order_date`, descriptions, schedule, `payment_schedule_type`, `customer_payment_method`.

**Pricing:** `total_service_charge`, `offer_id` (`null` = remove).

**Status:** `order_status`.

**Line:** `service_items.update[]` with `_id` = `{{orderServiceId}}` (optional when order has one line).

**Nested:** `additional_charges`, `order_payments` — `{ create, update, delete }`.

**Do not send** order `is_paid`. Response: `record`, optional `nested`, optional `pricing`.

See `docs/ORDER_MODULE_FRONTEND.md` §8.

**DELETE /api/order/delete/:id** — sets `deleted_at` (soft delete). Does not remove related charges/payments rows.

Requires valid `orderId` and JWT with access to the order.
